name: Cozyville - Find Hidden Objects
author: Poki
description: Cozyville is a hidden object game where you search charming, hand-crafted scenes for cleverly tucked-away items. Explore cozy environments packed with tiny details and tricky hiding spots. Each level brings a new setting to pick through, so keep your eyes sharp — some objects blend right in. Relaxing, adorable, and surprisingly challenging. How many can you spot? How do I play Cozyville? Use your mouse to select click and find the hidden objects. Who created Cozyville? Cozyville is created by Room 606. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Cozyville for free? You can play Cozyville for free on Poki. Can I play Cozyville on mobile devices and desktop? Cozyville can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
